author: Abhishek Raj Dhardubey
name: Dense 2048 + Sliding64 Ablations
blurb: In-progress non-record submission built around the best dense long-context branch found so far. The 2048-token train/eval + sliding-window stride-64 recipe reached 1.29280874 BPB under the 16MB artifact cap, while several neighboring ablations and a first LoRA-TTT attempt regressed.
